summary: Alfred has good dependency hygiene with a well-maintained, focused dependency set. All direct dependencies are actively maintained and pinned through Cargo.lock. No abandoned or critical issues detected. Minor observation: rust_lisp (0.18.0) is single-maintainer, but actively used and recently published.

duplicates.recommendation: No duplication issue: crossterm is the low-level terminal handler, ratatui is the high-level widget library. Correct separation of concerns.

supply_chain_risks.name: rust_lisp
supply_chain_risks.recommendation: Monitor for maintenance status. Project is well-documented and has stable API.

supply_chain_risks.name: tree-sitter-* grammars
supply_chain_risks.recommendation: Safe to use. Maintained as part of tree-sitter project.

recommendations.title: Update tree-sitter-rust to 0.25.0
recommendations.description: Minor version bump available for tree-sitter-rust (0.24.1 -> 0.25.0). No breaking changes expected. Improves grammar accuracy for Rust syntax highlighting.

recommendations.title: Monitor rust_lisp maintenance
recommendations.description: rust_lisp is a critical dependency with single maintainer. Set up quarterly checks for activity/maintenance status. Consider having a fallback Lisp implementation plan if maintenance stalls.

recommendations.title: Add SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) generation
recommendations.description: Generate and version SBOM (e.g., via cargo-sbom or cargo-cyclonedx) to improve supply chain transparency and vulnerability tracking.
